valueDescription: The service is structured around what should change for the business after launch: sharper positioning, stronger trust, better inquiry flow, more sales or a stronger base for growth.
fitForTitle: When this service is the right fit
outcomesDescription: The expected result of this service: what changes in positioning, conversion flow, structure or growth-readiness once the work is delivered.
searchIntentTitle: Commercial queries worth building the page for
searchIntentDescription: For this service, the page should match real search intent. That is why I explicitly outline key phrasing, usage scenarios and the business value behind the offer.

estimate.title: Need an estimate for your exact case?
estimate.description: Tell me what you sell, who your client is, what the business goal should be and whether the site is meant for ads, SEO or product presentation. That makes it possible to suggest the right format quickly.
